title: Amazon Transcribe Transcription Job
description: Schema representing an Amazon Transcribe transcription job resource.

TranscriptionJobName.description: The name of the transcription job.

TranscriptionJobStatus.description: The status of the transcription job.

LanguageCode.description: The language code for the input audio.

MediaSampleRateHertz.description: The sample rate of the input audio in Hz.

MediaFormat.description: The format of the input media file.

Media.description: The location of the input media file.

MediaFileUri.description: The S3 location of the input media file.

RedactedMediaFileUri.description: The S3 location of the redacted media file.

Transcript.description: The location of the transcription output.

TranscriptFileUri.description: The S3 location of the transcription output.

RedactedTranscriptFileUri.description: The S3 location of the redacted transcription output.

Settings.description: Optional settings for the transcription job.

VocabularyName.description: The name of a vocabulary to use for transcription.

ShowSpeakerLabels.description: Whether to identify different speakers in the audio.

MaxSpeakerLabels.description: The maximum number of speakers to identify.

CreationTime.description: A timestamp indicating when the job was created.

StartTime.description: A timestamp indicating when the job started processing.

CompletionTime.description: A timestamp indicating when the job was completed.

FailureReason.description: The reason the job failed, if applicable.

Tags.description: A list of tags associated with the transcription job.

Tag.description: A key-value pair for tagging resources.
